docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESSEX FOX PLAZA, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERS, DQUARTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 MARKET STREET #1614, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94102, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY* ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78913917)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $71.96. (TRANSACTION ID # 78913917) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX FOX PLAZA, LP
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 78913917) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX FOX PLAZA, LP

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78913917), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX FOX PLAZA, LP SERVED MAR-10-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, DQUARTE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 78913917), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX FOX PLAZA, LP SERVED MAR-10-2026, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF UD-120 (TRANSACTION ID # 78913917) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX FOX PLAZA, LP
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX FOX PLAZA, LP AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, DQUARTE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 78913917) AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, DQUARTE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 79007062)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, DQUARTE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERS, DQUARTE
